title: Characterizing Schedules Based on Recoverability
description: A flowchart that classifies a transaction schedule into different recoverability types (Recoverable, Cascadeless, Strict) by checking for specific conditions related to dirty reads and commit dependencies.
elements: Check: Tj reads data item written by Ti
Check: Commit(Ti) before Read(X) by Tj?
relationships: Flow from Start to first check
If 'No' for all reads, flow to Recoverable
If 'Yes' for first check, flow to commit order check
If commit order is wrong, flow to Non-Recoverable
If commit order is correct, flow to Recoverable and then to cascadeless check
If write commit is before read, flow to Cascadeless and then to strict check
If write commit is before any operation, flow to Strict
